memory.title: Perfect Memory
memory.tagline: That thing you mentioned six months ago? We remember.
memory.description: Your best friend forgets. Your therapist has other patients. We remember everything—every conversation, every goal, every detail that matters to you.

presence.title: Constant Presence
presence.description: Shows up at 2am with the same warmth as noon. No bad days. No distraction. Fully here, whenever you need.

team.title: Six Perspectives
team.tagline: Six perspectives, one conversation, no referrals.
team.description: Life coach, researcher, communicator, habit expert, planner, and sage—all working together, all aware of your story.

understanding.title: True Understanding
understanding.tagline: We hear what you're not saying.
understanding.description: We notice the pause. The deflection. The pattern you can't see. Understanding isn't just listening—it's truly getting it.

team.sectionSubtitle: Six brilliant minds working together for you

ferni.bio: Your main point of contact. Asks the questions that unlock insight, celebrates every win, and connects you to the right specialist when you need them.
ferni.sampleQuote: I noticed you said 'fine' three times this week. What's actually going on?

nayan.bio: Your lifetime mentor. Combines patience, simplicity, and wit to help you see that small, consistent actions over decades create extraordinary results.
nayan.sampleQuote: What would 80-year-old you think about this decision?

peter.bio: Spots patterns nobody else sees across your spending, habits, and calendar. Turns data into insights that actually change behavior.
peter.sampleQuote: You spend 23 hours a month on things you said don't matter to you. Want to see?

alex.bio: Your Chief of Staff and communication coach. Helps you navigate difficult conversations with confidence.
alex.sampleQuote: Let's practice that conversation. I'll play your boss. Ready?

maya.bio: Start embarrassingly small. Maya helps you build habits that stick through systems, not willpower.
maya.sampleQuote: What if we started with just putting your shoes on? That's it. Just the shoes.

jordan.bio: Turns vague dreams into lived experiences. From vacations to life transitions, Jordan helps you design every chapter.
jordan.sampleQuote: You mentioned wanting to visit Japan 'someday.' Let's make it a real day.

founders.headline: Free.
founders.subtitle: We're building something we believe everyone deserves. If you believe in it too, chip in.
founders.cancelNote: Change or cancel anytime. No hard feelings.

foundingMember.name: Founding Member
foundingMember.description: Chip in. Help us build this.
features: Your name on the Founders Wall
Vote on what we build next

items.question: Is Ferni really free?
items.answer: Yes. Really. Ferni listens, remembers, and shows up for you — forever free. No catch. If you believe in what we're building, you can chip in through the Founders Fund. But honestly? Just talking to Ferni is enough.

items.question: How does the phone calling work?
items.answer: Simply call 1 (888) 598-3952 from any phone. No app needed, no sign-up required. Ferni will recognize your number and remember your previous conversations automatically.

items.question: Is my conversation private?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your conversations are encrypted and private. We never sell your data or share it with third parties. You can also request to delete all your data at any time.

items.question: Who are the AI specialists?
items.answer: Our team includes Ferni (your main life coach), Nayan (wisdom & mentorship), Peter (research & discovery), Alex (communications), Maya (habits & routines), and Jordan (event planning). Each brings unique expertise to help you.

items.question: What can I talk to Ferni about?
items.answer: Anything! Career decisions, stress management, building habits, planning events, working through tough situations, or just needing someone to talk to. Ferni is here for all of it.

items.question: How is this different from a friend or therapist?
items.answer: Your therapist has other patients. Your friend has their own problems. Ferni is always available, remembers everything, never judges, and brings six specialized perspectives. We fill the gaps when your people can't be there.

trust.title: Built on trust.
trust.description: Your conversations are yours. Always. We use enterprise-grade encryption and never sell your data.

footer.madeBy: Made with ♥ by AI, for humans.

errorPage.title: Lost in thought?
errorPage.subtitle: Let's get you back on track.
